race.comment: BEATS OF WAR (6) ran below expectations last time at this track, finishing ninth after starting at $7.50. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. ZORBRIST (5) was well fancied last start over 1435m at this track when fourth, beaten 5 lengths. Deserves another chance. STREET MASCHINO (12) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when sixth, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1600m at this track after he was in contention on the corner. Should be peaking now and can find peak form this time. LUCKY LANDING (4) returned from a spell two weeks ago when he was prominent at the turn before being beaten 5 lengths into fifth over 1435m at this track. Fitter so expect a better run this time. IMA WILD GIRL (10) can go one better without surprising.
